gameTitle: Dragon Quest I & II (Game Boy Color)

achievements.title: The Journey Begins
achievements.description: [DWI] Leave the King's chamber with the Key
achievements.notes: Obtained automatically at the start of the game in Radatome Castle.

achievements.title: Destiny of the Descendant
achievements.description: [DWI] Find the stone tablet in Loto's Cave
achievements.notes: Examine Roto's tombstone on B2F of Roto's Cave.

achievements.title: Completely Cleaned
achievements.description: [DWI] Find every chest in the Rocky Cave
achievements.notes: Open every chest in the Mountain Cave. The walkthrough guides you through all of them.

achievements.title: Locksmith
achievements.notes: Buy a Magic Key from the Magic Key Shop in Rimuldar for 16 Gold.

achievements.title: Ghost Town
achievements.description: [DWI] Discover the abandoned town of Domdora
achievements.notes: Enter the abandoned town of Domdora.

achievements.title: Sweet Dreams
achievements.description: [DWI] Defeat the Golem outside of Mercado
achievements.notes: Defeat the Golem outside Melkido using the PixyFlute to put it to sleep.

achievements.title: Nightmare
achievements.description: [DWI] Defeat the Golem outside of Mercado without using the PixyFlute
achievements.missableCutoff: After defeating the Golem in section 2.17
achievements.notes: Fight the Golem without using the PixyFlute in battle. The PixyFlute is obtained in section 2.15. Do not use it during the golem fight, or defeat the golem before obtaining the flute.

achievements.title: Tomb Raider
achievements.notes: Enter the Grave of Garai to find the Silver Harp and Fairy Flute.

achievements.title: Puff-Puff
achievements.notes: Pay 20 Gold to the young lady in the Maira bathhouse for a Puff Puff massage.

achievements.title: Richest Hero
achievements.notes: GoldMen first appear in the overworld near the Holy Monolith. Defeat one for 650 Gold.

achievements.title: Metallic Mania
achievements.notes: Metalys can appear as rare encounters in later game areas. Use critical-hit weapons or Fireban to defeat them.

achievements.title: Magic Medicine
achievements.description: [DWI] Learn the Heal spell at level 3
achievements.notes: Reach Level 3 to learn Heal. Happens naturally during early leveling.

achievements.title: Let There Be Light
achievements.description: [DWI] Learn the Radiant spell at Level 9
achievements.notes: Reach Level 9 to learn Radiant. The walkthrough suggests training to Level 9-10 in the Mountain Cave area.

achievements.title: Quick Escape
achievements.description: [DWI] Learn the Outside spell at Level 12
achievements.notes: Reach Level 12 to learn Outside. The walkthrough guides training to Level 12 at Rimuldar.

achievements.title: Social Distancing
achievements.description: [DWI] Learn the Repel spell at Level 15
achievements.notes: Reach Level 15 to learn Repel. The walkthrough guides training to Level 15 in the Grave of Garai.

achievements.title: Kill It With Fire
achievements.description: [DWI] Learn the Firebane spell at Level 19
achievements.notes: Reach Level 19 to learn Firebane. Will happen naturally during endgame progression.

achievements.title: Shiny Strings
achievements.notes: Find the Silver Harp in the Grave of Garai. Required to trade for the Rain Staff.

achievements.title: Flute of the Faerie
achievements.notes: Find the Fairy Flute (PixyFlute) in the Grave of Garai. Used to put the Golem to sleep.

achievements.title: Seal of Loto
achievements.notes: One of the three items needed to form the Rainbow Bridge. Found during late-game progression.

achievements.title: Here Comes the Sun
achievements.notes: The Sun Stone is found within Radatome Castle. One of the three items needed for the Rainbow Bridge.

achievements.title: Stormy Serenade
achievements.notes: Trade the Silver Harp to the Old Man at the Rain Shrine for the Rain Cloud Staff.

achievements.title: Parry This!
achievements.description: [DWI] Purchase the Silver Shield in Mercado
achievements.notes: Buy the Mirror Shield (Silver Shield) at Weapon Shop 3 in Melkido for 14800 Gold.

achievements.title: Armor of Loto
achievements.notes: Found in the King Dragon Castle (DracoLord's Castle). The best armor in DQ I.

achievements.title: Sword of Loto
achievements.notes: Found in the King Dragon Castle. The best weapon in DQ I.

achievements.title: A Drop of Pride
achievements.notes: Form the Rainbow Drop when the Rain Staff and Sun Stone are combined. Used to create the Rainbow Bridge to the King Dragon's island.

achievements.title: Secret Tunnel
achievements.description: [DWI] Find the hidden stairwell in the DracoLord's Castle
achievements.notes: Find the hidden staircase in the King Dragon Castle that leads to the DracoLord's chamber.

achievements.title: Deal with the Devil
achievements.notes: Accept the DracoLord's offer to join him instead of fighting. Reload your save afterwards to get the Dragonslayer achievement.

achievements.title: Dragonslayer
achievements.description: [DWI] Defeat the DracoLord and save the land of Alefgard
achievements.notes: Defeat the DracoLord in his castle. The final boss of DQ I.

achievements.title: But Thou Must
achievements.description: [DWI] Rescue Princess Lora in the Marsh Cave
achievements.notes: Defeat the Dragon guarding Princess Lora in the Swamp Cave and rescue her.

achievements.title: The Wrong Castle
achievements.description: [DWI] Bring Princess Lora to the DracoLord
achievements.missableCutoff: After returning Princess Lora to the King (2.13)
achievements.notes: After rescuing Princess Lora in 2.12, take her directly to the King Dragon Castle instead of returning her to Radatome Castle. The opportunity is lost once you return her to the King in section 2.13.

achievements.title: Family Reunion
achievements.description: [DWI] Return Princess Lora to the King
achievements.notes: Return Princess Lora to King at Radatome Castle. Receive the Princess' Love item.

achievements.title: Roll Credits
achievements.notes: Watch the credits after completing Dragon Quest I.

achievements.title: Adventure Awaits
achievements.description: [DWII] Obtain the Copper Sword from the starting chest
achievements.notes: Open the chest at Laurasia Castle to get the Copper Sword.

achievements.title: Proper Purification
achievements.description: [DWII] Discover the Prince of Cannock's whereabouts at the Hero's Spring
achievements.notes: Visit the Spring of Bravery (Hero's Spring) to learn about the Prince of Cannock.

achievements.title: A Helping Hand
achievements.description: [DWII] Have the Prince of Cannock join your party
achievements.notes: The Prince of Cannock joins your party. Occurs at Liriza or Sumaltria Castle after learning of his whereabouts at the Spring of Bravery.

achievements.title: Cursed No More
achievements.description: [DWII] Have the Princess of Moonbrook join your party
achievements.notes: Use the Mirror of Ra to undo Princess Linda's curse at Moonbrook Castle. She joins as a party member.

achievements.title: Over the River
achievements.description: [DWII] Leap across the river after climbing the southern Drakhorn Tower
achievements.notes: Climb the South Dragon's Horn (Drakhorn Tower) to cross the river and reach new areas.

achievements.title: Set Sail
achievements.description: [DWII] Receive the Boat as a gift for saving the town of Lianport
achievements.notes: Receive the boat after helping the town of Lupegana (Lianport).

achievements.title: Barter Flute
achievements.description: [DWII] Trade the Treasure for the EchoFlute
achievements.notes: Trade a treasure from the Sunken Ship for the Echo Flute.

achievements.title: Puff-Puff 2.0
achievements.notes: Receive a Puff Puff massage at Perpoy or another town in DQ II.

achievements.title: Slippery Experience
achievements.notes: Metabbles (Metal Babbles) appear as rare encounters in late-game areas. Give massive EXP.

achievements.title: Prince of Power
achievements.description: [DWII] Learn the Prince of Cannock's final spell at Level 28
achievements.notes: Prince Rolando learns his final spell at Level 28. Occurs naturally during late-game progression.

achievements.title: Princess of Power
achievements.description: [DWII] Learn the Princess of Moonbrook's final spell at Level 29
achievements.notes: Princess Linda learns her final spell at Level 29. Occurs naturally during late-game progression.

achievements.title: Magic Mirror
achievements.notes: Find the Mirror of Ra (LarMirror) in the Mirror of Ra section.

achievements.title: Canopy Cape
achievements.notes: Obtain the Wind Cloak at the Wind Tower.

achievements.title: Solar Seal
achievements.notes: One of the five seals needed. Found at Radatome Castle in DQ II.

achievements.title: Stellar Seal
achievements.notes: One of the five seals needed. Found at the Holy Monolith in DQ II.

achievements.title: Luna Seal
achievements.notes: One of the five seals needed. Found at the Moon Tower.

achievements.title: Aquatic Seal
achievements.notes: One of the five seals needed. Found in the Undersea Cave.

achievements.title: Lively Seal
achievements.notes: One of the five seals needed. Found at the Spirit Monolith.

achievements.title: Shard from the Skies
achievements.notes: Find the Moon Shard at the Moon Tower.

achievements.title: Gift from the Goddess
achievements.notes: Obtain the Rubiss Charm at the Rhone Monolith. Required to reveal Hargon's Castle.

achievements.title: False Idol
achievements.notes: Find the Evil Statue in Hargon's Temple.

achievements.title: The Shiny Key
achievements.notes: Find the Silver Key at Dercondal.

achievements.title: The Golden Key
achievements.notes: Find the Gold Key at the Moon Tower.

achievements.title: The Jailer's Key
achievements.notes: Find the Jail Key at the Monolith North of Lupegana.

achievements.title: The Stolen Key
achievements.notes: Find the Dam Key in Rhone Cave (First Visit).

achievements.title: Open World
achievements.notes: Obtain the World Map early in DQ II, likely at Laurasia Castle.

achievements.title: Yggdrasil's Leaf
achievements.notes: Find the World Leaf at the World Tree Island.

achievements.title: Shop Thief
achievements.notes: Find the Gaia Armor in a shop during Pit Stop #3 or nearby.

achievements.title: Damp Robe
achievements.notes: Find the Water Robe at Tepa.

achievements.title: Sword of Loto
achievements.notes: Find the Loto Sword in Rhone Cave (Second Visit).

achievements.title: Shield of Loto
achievements.notes: Find the Loto Shield in Rhone Cave.

achievements.title: Helmet of Loto
achievements.notes: Find the Loto Helmet in Rhone Cave.

achievements.title: Armor of Loto
achievements.notes: Find the Loto Armor in Rhone Cave or nearby.

achievements.title: Staff of Thunder
achievements.notes: Find the Bolt Wand at the Monolith South of Rhone.

achievements.title: Seal of Loto
achievements.notes: Find the Loto Seal at Perpoy or nearby.

achievements.title: The Sick Prince
achievements.description: [DWII] Release the Prince of Cannock from Hargon's curse
achievements.notes: Release Prince Rolando from Hargon's curse during the endgame at Hargon's Temple.

achievements.title: Gambler
achievements.description: [DWII] Win a reward from the slot machine
achievements.notes: Win a prize from the slot machine. Available in towns like Perpoy.

achievements.title: True Sight
achievements.description: [DWII] Reveal Hargon's Castle with the RubissChm
achievements.notes: Use the Rubiss Charm to reveal Hargon's Castle for the final dungeon.

achievements.title: Evil Defeated
achievements.description: [DWII] Defeat Sidoh and save the land of Torland
achievements.notes: Defeat Sidoh, the true final boss of Dragon Quest II.

achievements.title: Foe of the Past
achievements.description: [DWII] Become friends with the DracoLord's great grandson after defeating Sidoh
achievements.notes: After defeating Sidoh, speak with the DracoLord's descendant in the ending epilogue.

achievements.title: A Long Journey's End
achievements.notes: Watch the credits after completing Dragon Quest II.
